allow: Bash(node -e "const si = require\('./node_modules/react-icons/si/index.mjs'\); const keys = Object.keys\(si\); const matches = keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('css'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('html'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('visual'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('vscode'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('java'\) && !k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('javascript'\) && !k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('typescript'\)\); console.log\(matches.join\('\\n'\)\)")
